name: enterprise-whatsapp-communication-platform
description: Enterprise-Grade WhatsApp Business Communication Platform with Advanced Automation

scripts.restore-original: git reset --hard origin/master && echo '✅ Restored to original state!'
scripts.save-to-original: git add . && git commit -m 'Platform updates' && git push origin master && echo '✅ Saved to original!'
scripts.platform-status: git status && echo '📊 Platform status checked!'
scripts.sync-with-original: git pull origin master && echo '🔄 Synced with original!'
scripts.setup: npm install && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '🚀 Platform setup complete!'
